title: Senior Plant Manager at Luminous Power Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Luminous Power Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Luminous Power Technologies in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Luminous Power Technologies:
Luminous Power Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies!
